title: Device Home Screen - Custom Quick Settings
feature: Device Home Screen - Custom Quick Settings
scenario: Verify that the Device Home Screen displays Quick Settings based on user selection in Device Settings, including showing the correct number when 1-3 options are selected and showing none when all are deselected with the toggle ON.
steps: Go to Device Settings > Quick Settings Selection.
Navigate to the Device Home Screen and confirm that 3 Quick Settings are displayed.
Return to Device Settings > Quick Settings Selection.
Navigate to the Device Home Screen and confirm that 2 Quick Settings are displayed.
Return to Device Settings > Quick Settings Selection.
Navigate to the Device Home Screen and confirm that 1 Quick Setting is displayed.
Return to Device Settings > Quick Settings Selection.
Deselect all options while keeping the toggle ON, then save.
Navigate to the Device Home Screen and confirm that no Quick Settings are displayed.
expected: The Device Home Screen displays the correct number of Quick Settings based on the user's selection (3, 2, or 1). When all options are deselected with the toggle ON, no Quick Settings are displayed on the Home Screen.
